finding_results.notes: Reworked all four cited paragraphs with differentiated cadence, removed repeated 'X and Y and Z' stacking from the targets, and ensured each target paragraph now closes on concrete physical detail (tongue shaping the lie, grocery bags by the door, printer sheets snapping into tray, meltwater seeping through boot seam).

summary: Resolved CH07-F005 by varying sentence architecture across the four target passages and replacing repeated triadic-and rhythm with sharper, scene-anchored closures that preserve chapter voice and pressure.
